
### third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/sqldelight/com/farmerbb/notepad/model/CrossRef.sq
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS CrossRef(
    metadataId INTEGER NOT NULL,
    contentsId INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY(metadataId, contentsId)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_CrossRef_contentsId ON CrossRef(contentsId);

insert:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO CrossRef(metadataId, contentsId) VALUES ?;

delete:
DELETE FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId = :id;

deleteMultiple:
DELETE FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId IN ?;

get:
SELECT * FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId = :id;

getMultiple:
SELECT * FROM CrossRef WHERE metadataId IN ?;
### third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/sqldelight/com/farmerbb/notepad/model/NoteContents.sq
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS NoteContents(
    contentsId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    text TEXT,
    draftText TEXT
);

update:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteContents(contentsId, text, draftText) VALUES ?;

insert:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteContents(text, draftText) VALUES ?;

delete:
DELETE FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId = :id;

deleteMultiple:
DELETE FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId IN ?;

get:
SELECT * FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId = :id;

getMultiple:
SELECT * FROM NoteContents WHERE contentsId IN ?;

getIndex:
SELECT last_insert_rowid();
### third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/sqldelight/com/farmerbb/notepad/model/NoteMetadata.sq
import java.util.Date;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS NoteMetadata(
    metadataId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    date INTEGER AS Date NOT NULL,
    hasDraft INTEGER AS Boolean NOT NULL
);

update:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteMetadata(metadataId, title, date, hasDraft) VALUES ?;

insert:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO NoteMetadata(title, date, hasDraft) VALUES ?;

delete:
DELETE FROM NoteMetadata WHERE metadataId = :id;

deleteMultiple:
DELETE FROM NoteMetadata WHERE metadataId IN ?;

getUnsorted:
SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata;

getSortedByDateDescending:
SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata ORDER BY date DESC;

getSortedByDateAscending:
SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata ORDER BY date ASC;

get:
SELECT * FROM NoteMetadata WHERE metadataId = :id;

getDraftId:
SELECT metadataId FROM NoteMetadata WHERE hasDraft = 1;

getIndex:
SELECT last_insert_rowid();
